title: be going to (do)
desc: 계획된 의도 또는 근거 있는 예측
examples: I'm going to go with what's familiar first and take the carrot. They say always eat your veggies first.

title: will / shall
examples: We got really lucky. This restaurant is beautiful, and there was no wait list. They gave us complimentary bread and oil, which is great because I am hungry. We've got a large menu here, and a large wine list. Very tempting. I'm not sure if I'm craving anything specific. I think I just have to browse the menu and see what sounds good. Do you recommend? Yes, so on the appetizer side, I would recommend onion soup. Onion soup, okay. Or if you would like a salad, it's really popular as the best of shrimp one. Oh, okay. On this side, I would recommend beef bburingion, okay. And lasagna, it's really popular. If you would like pasta, so I would recommend you garlic pasta. Okay, thank you so much. No problem. Yes, I think we'll have the grilled salmon.
And maybe I'll just wait on a drink for now. Okay. Okay, thank you.

title: can / could / be able to
examples: Thank you. You can never go wrong with bread. I like to dip it in the oil in vinegar. I do not fear carbs. I embrace fun. I wasn't going to drink pop, but they put two straws in, so it'd be rude not to at least take a sip. I got my stew and it smells delicious. This is the first time I've ever tried this before. Actually, I haven't had much French food, so it's a new experience for me.
I've got my wet wipe, so I can wash my hands before I dig in. Time for my first bite.

Mmm, good. The carrot's very soft and texture is easy to chew and the taste is kind of what I imagine the beef taste like. It tastes very meaty, even though it's a carrot. Wow, very tender. It was so easy to bite into. I can see this being comfort food for many people. Thank you.
I can tell they cooked this really well. They definitely know what they're doing in the kitchen here.

I use my fork to get a piece of beef and I put it on my plate and use the knife to cut it. So it's the perfect bite size. I think we're all set. Can I get a small box for take-out? Yeah, sure. Okay, thank you. Yep, no problem. Thank you so much. Can we get the bill or do we pay right up front? Okay, we can pay right up front. Thank you so much.
